name: QEMU SeaBIOS + TCG emulated TPM (LapEE test guest)

attributes.measurement-root: SRTM via SeaBIOS ACPI TPM2 table

notes: SeaBIOS's TCG log extends PCR 0 and PCR 7 with the same deterministic digest (both equal to sha256 of a fixed sequence of EV_NO_ACTION + EV_S_CRTM_VERSION events plus the Secure-Boot-OFF signal). PCR 1 varies with ACPI config so we don't pin it. Values here are from SeaBIOS rel-1.16.3 bundled with QEMU — they WILL change across QEMU versions. This profile identifies a *development* platform: `trust_tier: development_only'. Production LapEE verifiers should refuse `trust_tier: development_only' matches, or require a separate test-only trust anchor provisioned out-of-band.
